focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A bombing at the American Embassy kills two translators; Superintendent Chin suspects Ricky Tan. Lee takes the case despite being on vacation, hiding the truth from Carter.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Focal character deceived about the main plot
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter questions Lee about a phone call, and Lee falsely claims they are invited to a club party.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter is suspicious but has been given a false explanation about their plans.
evidence_quotes: CARTER What was that? Did you just pick up a case? Did we just take another damn case on my vacation?
LEE Of course not. My Superindendent invited us to a club tonight. Big party.
CARTER Don't be messing with me, Lee. I will kick your ass. I'll hit you so hard you'll end up in the Ming Dynasty.

relation_updates: Lee deceives Carter about the case
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Impulsive LAPD detective on vacation, unaware his partner has taken a case.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter, defying protocol, takes Lee's badge and gun, fires shots to silence the bar, miscommunicates in Chinese, segregates the crowd, and fails to get info on Ricky Tan as gangsters flee.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: LAPD detective who disrupts an undercover operation by taking charge in a Triad bar
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter takes Lee's badge and gun, fires shots to silence the bar, and attempts to interrogate the crowd about Ricky Tan, but fails and alerts gangsters who flee.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Gangsters escape, and no information on Ricky Tan is obtained
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The Triads are now aware of Carter and Lee's presence due to Carter's actions
evidence_quotes: Carter on the Karaoke stage doing a dead-on Michael Jackson, singing his heart out.
Before Lee can react, Carter has lifted Lee's badge and gun.
Carter bounds back on stage, pulls the plug on the music and fires three shots into the ceiling, silencing the bar.
Except in the back, where Lee spots several gangsters leaving.

relation_updates: Carter asserts dominance over Lee by taking his badge and gun
status_updates: Carter openly confronts the Fu-Cang-Long Triads in their own bar
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Reckless detective who prioritizes bold, disruptive actions over protocol

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 13、INT. LEE'S UNMARKED POLICE CAR - LATER THAT NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter and Lee, injured and arguing, discuss the embassy explosion that killed two translators; Carter suspects Ricky Tan was responsible.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Carter confronts Lee about past lies and learns of the embassy bombing
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter accuses Lee of lying, then hears about the embassy explosion and immediately suspects Ricky Tan
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter is informed of the embassy bombing and suspects Ricky Tan's involvement
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The embassy bombing and Ricky Tan's responsibility remain unconfirmed
evidence_quotes: CARTER You lied to me.
LEE No time. There was an explosion at the American Embassy today -- two American translators were killed.
CARTER So that Ricky Tan, he's the one who blew up the Embassy?

relation_updates: Carter expresses anger and resentment toward Lee for lying, straining their partnership
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Detective who quickly forms suspicions based on new information

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee and Carter are overpowered by Ricky Tan's men at a spa; Lee is thrown out the front door, and Carter is lifted over two men's shoulders.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Carter self-appoints as Lee's partner and impulsively confronts Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter decides to confront Ricky Tan alone after Lee leaves, shatters Tan's laptop, and escalates the situation, leading to a fight where he is overpowered by Tan's men.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter is captured and held by Tan's men.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Carter is in custody, and Lee is fighting Tan's men.
evidence_quotes: Carter makes a decision, gets up and walks towards him.
CARTER Ricky Tan, I've been looking all over for you. Get up.
CARTER I'm Lee's new muscle, his right arm -- and don't let the robe fool you.
CARTER GRABS THE LAPTOP from Ricky and throws it across the room - SHATTERING IT against the wall.

relation_updates: Carter asserts himself as Lee's 'right arm' and partner
status_updates: Carter is overpowered and captured by Tan's men
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Aggressive and impulsive partner whose direct actions provoke capture.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee and Carter clash over cultural differences and personal lives during an argument, escalating tensions after a raid, with Lee storming out angrily.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Detective in heated argument with Lee, preparing to leave Hong Kong.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter declares he will retrieve his passport and go home after escalating argument with Lee over cultural differences and personal lives.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Retrieve passport from Heaven on Earth and depart Hong Kong.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter left alone in Lee's office, half-dressed, after Lee storms out and slams the door.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Conflict with Lee remains unresolved; Carter's ability to retrieve his passport and leave is uncertain.
evidence_quotes: Carter finishes putting on a BLACK CHINESE STYLE SUIT from Lee's closet, then moves for the door.
CARTER Back to Heaven on Earth. I need my damn passport back. I'm going home.
Lee quickly walks out, slamming the door behind him, leaving Carter half dressed.

relation_updates: Relationship with Lee becomes openly hostile.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Frustrated detective at breaking point, ready to abandon the case and partnership.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter urges Lee to trust him and take the plane to LA to uncover the truth behind his father's death, emphasizing the personal importance of resolving such a loss.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Carter learns Lee's father was murdered by Ricky Tan and shifts from hostility to empathy.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter hears Lee reveal that Ricky Tan killed his father, causing Carter to listen intently and respond with understanding.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter is empathetic toward Lee and aware of his personal motivation, but Lee walks away after apologizing.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Carter is ordered back to L.A., and the case against Ricky Tan remains unresolved.
evidence_quotes: Ricky Tan killed my father.
Carter is suddenly all ears, listening intently now to Lee.
This is about your Daddy's death? Hell, Lee, you know my father died on the job. You could have told me...

relation_updates: Carter's relationship with Lee shifts from hostile to empathetic after learning Lee's father was killed by Ricky Tan.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A partner who becomes supportive after learning a personal truth.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Isabella recruits Carter and Lee to locate Hu Li's counterfeit plates, enlisting their local knowledge while secretly reporting their involvement to Sterling.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: recruited Secret Service operative
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter is recruited by Isabella to locate Hu Li's counterfeit plates for the U.S. Secret Service.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Find the counterfeit plates for the Secret Service.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter has been recruited and is now working for the U.S. Secret Service.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The location of Hu Li's counterfeit plates is unknown.
evidence_quotes: Okay, find out where Hu Li's keeping the plates.
From this moment on, you're working for the United States Secret Service.
They exit quickly, trying to hide their excitement.

relation_updates: Isabella recruits Carter into the Secret Service
status_updates: Affiliation changed to United States Secret Service
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Detective now officially affiliated with the U.S. Secret Service on a mission to find counterfeit plates.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter and Hu Li face off on the red carpet, exchanging banter as they prepare to fight; she wields a sword with skill, toying with him as he uses a fighting stick.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Carter decides to confront Hu Li alone, allowing Lee to pursue Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter stops on the red carpet to face Hu Li, instructing Lee to go after Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Handle Hu Li to clear the path for Lee.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Engaged in a fight with Hu Li, who is toying with him by slicing his fighting sticks.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the confrontation with Hu Li.
evidence_quotes: But halfway up the carpet, Carter stops.
CARTER (CONT'D) You go after Ricky. I got this.
DEAD CENTER ON THE RED CARPET - HU LI AND CARTER FACE OFF!
She's toying with him.

relation_updates: Takes responsibility for Hu Li threat
status_updates: Engaged in one-on-one confrontation with Hu Li
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A partner who takes on a threat to enable his ally's mission.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee hesitates to shoot Ricky Tan, who provokes him; Tan attacks with a bag, leading to a struggle where both Lee and Carter kick Tan, causing him to fall 20 stories to his death.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lee's partner who enters during the confrontation and assists in subduing Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Verbally intervenes to stop Lee from shooting Ricky Tan, then physically joins Lee in kicking Tan through a window.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Prevent Lee from extrajudicial killing and ensure Tan faces justice.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ricky Tan dead after falling from the penthouse window.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: None in this immediate scene.
evidence_quotes: just as Carter bursts in the room.
CARTER Lee, wait a second. It's not worth it, man. He's making you do this.
CARTER C'mon, Lee. He's going to jail. You won, now just put the gun down.
Lee and Carter come flying at him TOGETHER. Both KICKING HIM SQUARE IN THE CHEST.

relation_updates: Solidified partnership with Lee through joint action
status_updates: Participated in Ricky Tan's death
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Partner who de-escalates verbally and acts jointly in physical confrontation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee gives Carter his father's badge; Carter gives Lee $50,000. They plan a trip to New York, bonding before dancing through the airport as friends.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Carter, Lee's partner, exchanges gifts and plans a trip, strengthening their friendship.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Carter receives Lee's father's badge, gives Lee $50,000, and they agree to vacation in New York together.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Carter now has Lee's father's badge and is planning a trip to New York with Lee; they dance through the airport as friends.
evidence_quotes: CARTER Your father's badge? No way, man. I can't take this.
CARTER About fifty grand. I won it at the tables.

relation_updates: Carter receives Lee's father's badge as a token of trust and brotherhood
Carter and Lee plan a vacation to New York together
status_updates: Carter now possesses Lee's father's badge
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A supportive friend who encourages Lee to relax and enjoy life, shown through his actions and dialogue.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Carter begins as a vacationing LAPD detective misled by Lee into a Hong Kong bombing case. Through reckless confrontations, humiliating captures, and a partnership strained by cultural clashes, he gradually shifts from self-interest to invested ally. After learning Lee's father was murdered by Ricky Tan, Carter empathetically commits to the mission, is recruited by the Secret Service, and helps resolve the case. The journey culminates in a solidified friendship with Lee, marked by mutual trust and future plans.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Hu Li exits the American Embassy, buys pork bao, and remains calm as an explosion destroys two offices on the sixth floor behind her, telling the vendor to call the police.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Hu Li exits the American Embassy and buys pork bao from a street vendor.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li remains calm when an explosion occurs behind her and tells the vendor to call the police.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hu Li is on the street, eating pork bao, after the explosion.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hu Li's potential involvement in the embassy explosion.
evidence_quotes: Hu Li doesn't even flinch.
Someone better call the police.
She takes a bite of her pork bao

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Hu Li shows no reaction to the explosion.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter and Lee hang from a breaking bamboo pole after Hu Li escapes. Carter quips about mu-shu as they face a fall into a dumpster below, leading to the film's title.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: adversary attacking Lee and Carter on the roof
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li strikes Lee with a bamboo pole, knocking him off the roof, then kicks Carter off the roof, and flees.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hu Li flees the roof, leaving Lee and Carter hanging from a bamboo pole.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hu Li escapes, and her threat to the protagonists remains.
evidence_quotes: He is clocked by a 16-foot BAMBOO POLE.
HU LI - AGILE, GORGEOUS...DANGEROUS.
She takes one sultry step towards him, then twists her heel and WINDMILLS a HARD KICK that sends Carter FLYING OFF THE ROOF!
Hu Li looks down at them. She has no weapon to finish them off. She turns and runs, disappearing in the night.

relation_updates: engages in direct combat with Lee and Carter
auxiliary.persona_anchor: agile and dangerous combatant

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 40、INT. RICKY TAN'S YACHT - MAIN CABIN - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ricky Tan, after a bet loss, asks Lee to send Carter away; Carter resists, citing past abuse, but leaves after Lee reveals Ricky was his father's police partner for ten years.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Subordinate to Ricky Tan
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li is dismissed by Ricky Tan and shows hesitation and upset.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hu Li leaves the bedroom, excluded from the private meeting.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hu Li's emotional upset from the dismissal.
evidence_quotes: Hu Li opens the door
(to Hu Li) Leave us alone.
Hu Li hesitates, upset at being dismissed.

relation_updates: ordered to leave by Ricky Tan, showing emotional distress
status_updates: present in Tan's bedroom, then dismissed
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Subordinate who is emotionally affected by dismissal.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 41、EXT. RICKY TAN'S YACHT - UPPER DECK - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ricky Tan reveals a ship in Hong Kong Harbor before Hu Li arrives, shoots him, and flees as her bodyguards attack Lee, preventing pursuit.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: assassin killing Ricky Tan
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li bursts onto the deck with bodyguards, empties her gun into Ricky Tan's chest, and exits while bodyguards attack Lee.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ricky Tan is dead from gunshot wounds and has fallen into the water; Hu Li has exited the deck.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Hu Li's actions after exiting the deck are not shown.
evidence_quotes: Hu Li BURSTS onto the deck, flanked by FOUR BODYGUARDS.
Hu Li screams back as SHE EMPTIES HER GUN INTO RICKY'S CHEST.
Hu Li exits as Lee tries to fight off the bodyguards.

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Ricky Tan culminates in his death
bodyguards demonstrate loyalty by attacking Lee on her behalf
status_updates: location on upper deck of yacht
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Hu Li acts as a ruthless assassin by immediately and lethally attacking Ricky Tan.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee defeats two bodyguards, hears a speedboat, sees Hu Li board it, and runs toward the stern to pursue.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Fugitive escaping pursuit from Lee
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jumps onto a moving speedboat to evade capture
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Escape the ship by boarding the speedboat
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: On the speedboat, pulling away from the ship
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Lee is pursuing her after the escape
evidence_quotes: Hu Li jumps onboard the moving boat.

status_updates: location changes to speedboat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Agile in executing escape maneuvers

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 50、INT. CHEAP HOTEL ROOM - DOWNTOWN LA - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter spots Isabella wired with a microphone; Hu Li delivers a package, revealed as a bomb, prompting Lee and Carter to rush out immediately.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Operative delivering a bomb package to Isabella
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li hands a package to Isabella at the hotel room door, and Carter recognizes her as the previous package deliverer, identifying the package as a bomb.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Package delivered to Isabella; Carter and Lee immediately flee the room upon recognizing the bomb threat.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bomb threat remains active, and Hu Li's identity is exposed to Carter and Lee.
evidence_quotes: HU LI handing her a package.
Lee...it's the girl who delivered the package to your office. It's a bomb!

relation_updates: coordinates with Isabella in bomb delivery
status_updates: executes bomb delivery at hotel room
auxiliary.persona_anchor: covert operative

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee is captured by Hu Li and Triad soldiers after a fight; she forces a grenade into his mouth and threatens to detonate it unless he complies.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Triad enforcer who physically subdues and captures Inspector Lee
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Punches Lee to the ground, holds a knife to his throat, and forces a grenade into his mouth while threatening detonation
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to compel Lee to follow her under threat of grenade detonation
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee has a grenade taped in his mouth, and Hu Li holds the detonator, threatening immediate harm
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether Lee will comply with Hu Li's demand to follow her or attempt to escape
evidence_quotes: but he gets slammed to the ground by a right cross. Hu Li threw the punch, a roll of quarters in her hand
She holds a knife to Lee's throat.
She puts the small grenade in Lee's mouth, tapes it shut.

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Lee escalated to direct physical control and life-threatening coercion
status_updates: holds Lee captive with a grenade in his mouth
auxiliary.persona_anchor: ruthless enforcer

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 96、INT. EYE IN THE SKY ROOM - NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee and Isabella battle Hu Li and Triads for the detonator; Lee fights with one hand bound, kicks Hu Li, and is driven toward the Eye In The Sky window amid chaos.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist in the Eye in the Sky room, given the detonator by Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li threatens Lee with the detonator and a knife, then fights Isabella after she intervenes and kicks the detonator away.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To threaten Lee with the detonator and knife, and to fight Isabella.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hu Li is disarmed of the detonator by Isabella but continues fighting with her knife.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The outcome of the fight and control of the detonator.
evidence_quotes: Hu Li holds the detonator up to Lee, plays with the button.
Hu Li pulls her KNIFE, moves towards Lee. She holds the blade to his face.
Hu Li clutches the detonator in one hand, her knife in the other.
Hu Li WHIPS her KNIFE around, catches Isabella across the hand

relation_updates: adversarial relationship with Lee: threatens him with detonator and knife
adversarial relationship with Isabella: engages in physical fight
status_updates: entrusted with detonator by Ricky Tan
in possession of detonator and knife
engaged in combat with Lee and Isabella

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee and Carter, relieved, face Hu Li who appears with a large bomb, declaring they'll die together. She activates it, and they flee toward an open window to escape the explosion.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: injured bomber confronting Lee and Carter with a bomb to die together
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Hu Li, bleeding and half-dead, approaches Lee and Carter with a large bomb and activates it, stating they will die together
timeline_nodes.goal_state: to die together with Lee and Carter
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Hu Li activates the bomb, and Lee and Carter flee toward an open window
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: whether the bomb explosion kills Hu Li, Lee, and Carter or if Lee and Carter escape
evidence_quotes: Hu Li is walking toward them, bleeding and half-dead. She has ANOTHER BOMB IN HER HAND.
HU LI (in Chinese) We'll go together, Inspector.
Hu Li hits the switch - starts to smile.

relation_updates: directly addresses Inspector Lee with intent to die together
escalates conflict to murder-suicide attempt
status_updates: injured and half-dead
activates a bomb

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Hu Li is introduced as a composed operative during an embassy explosion. She escalates to physical confrontations, assassinations, and bomb deliveries, aligning with criminal figures like Ricky Tan and Steven Reign. Her arc culminates in intense combat with Lee and Carter, ending with a suicidal bomb attempt after being defeated.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A bombing at the American Embassy kills two translators; Superintendent Chin suspects Ricky Tan. Lee takes the case despite being on vacation, hiding the truth from Carter.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Inspector accepting the embassy bombing case
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee accepts responsibility for the embassy bombing case and tells Carter they are going to a club instead of revealing the case.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Investigate the embassy bombing linked to Ricky Tan
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee has taken the case and is proceeding to the club with Carter, who believes it is a social invitation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Carter does not know the real reason for going to the club.
evidence_quotes: LEE It's my responsibility.
LEE Of course not. My Superindendent invited us to a club tonight. Big party.

relation_updates: Lee lies to Carter, claiming a club invitation instead of a case
status_updates: On active duty for the bombing case
Responsible for embassy incident
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector who takes case responsibility and deceives his partner.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 13、INT. LEE'S UNMARKED POLICE CAR - LATER THAT NIGHT
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter and Lee, injured and arguing, discuss the embassy explosion that killed two translators; Carter suspects Ricky Tan was responsible.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Inspector revealing the embassy bombing to his angry partner Carter
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee discloses the embassy explosion that killed two translators, prompting Carter to suspect Ricky Tan's involvement
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To continue investigating the embassy bombing with Carter despite his anger
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Driving with Carter, who has just asked if Ricky Tan bombed the Embassy
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Carter will cooperate on the case given his anger over past lies
evidence_quotes: LEE No time. There was an explosion at the American Embassy today -- two American translators were killed.
CARTER So that Ricky Tan, he's the one who blew up the Embassy?

relation_updates: Carter expresses anger and distrust over past lies

status_updates: Lee reveals embassy bombing killed two American translators

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Master Fu directs Lee to a downtown massage parlor called 'Heaven on Earth' to find answers about Ricky Tan, hinting it holds key connections to his father's past.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Asking Master Fu for guidance on finding Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Master Fu directs Lee to 'Heaven on Earth' massage parlor for answers and reveals that Lee's father was his best student.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Investigate 'Heaven on Earth' massage parlor for information about Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee leaves Master Fu with the lead and heads down the pathway.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How 'Heaven on Earth' connects to Ricky Tan and Lee's father's past.
evidence_quotes: MASTER FU (CONT'D) He was the best I ever trained, you know. LEE Ricky Tan? MASTER FU No. Your father.
MASTER FU It's a massage parlor downtown. \"Heaven on Earth.\" You will find your answers there.
Lee cuts off Master Fu's reminisces -- he's obviously uncomfortable. LEE How do I find Ricky Tan?

relation_updates: Master Fu reveals personal connection between Lee's father and Ricky Tan
Lee shows discomfort discussing his father
status_updates: Lee obtains specific location lead for investigation
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An investigator whose case involves his father's history.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Sterling reveals the undercover agents' deaths are part of a larger investigation using Ricky Tan as bait to expose an extensive Triad smuggling ring beyond just Tan's involvement.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Hong Kong police inspector sidelined by a U.S. federal investigation
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee is informed by Special Agent Sterling that the killed agents were undercover U.S. customs agents and that Ricky Tan is being used as bait in a larger Secret Service operation; Sterling explicitly orders Lee to stay out of the way.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee is ordered to cease involvement in the investigation targeting Ricky Tan.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Lee is obstructed from pursuing Ricky Tan despite his local capabilities.
evidence_quotes: STERLING Stay the hell out of our way.
STERLING We know all about Tan. That's why we're leaving him out there as bait.

relation_updates: Relationship with Sterling is adversarial
status_updates: Removed from the investigation by U.S. Secret Service
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Local inspector whose jurisdiction is overridden by federal authorities.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Carter urges Lee to trust him and take the plane to LA to uncover the truth behind his father's death, emphasizing the personal importance of resolving such a loss.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Inspector removed from case by U.S. authorities after Ricky Tan's death
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee is taken off the investigation by Special Agent Sterling and Superintendent Chin, and he tells Carter that Ricky Tan killed his father five years ago.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee is dismissed from the case and has confided in Carter about his father's murder.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Lee's father's murder remains unsolved, with evidence vanished.
evidence_quotes: You finally got your revenge - at the expense of a U.S. Government investigation.
I'm sorry Lee, but my orders are to fully cooperate with the Secret Service.
Ricky Tan killed my father.
All the evidence against him disappeared, the smuggling case was unsolved.

relation_updates: Carter learns Lee's personal vendetta against Tan
Lee and Carter's conflict shifts to shared understanding of father's death
status_updates: Removed from case by Secret Service
Lost official authority to investigate
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector who, after losing official authority, reveals his personal motivation to Carter.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Isabella recruits Carter and Lee to locate Hu Li's counterfeit plates, enlisting their local knowledge while secretly reporting their involvement to Sterling.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lee is briefed by Isabella on the Superbill counterfeit operation and recruited to assist the U.S. Secret Service.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee learns about the Superbill's history and scope, and is officially tasked with finding the counterfeit plates.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Locate the counterfeit plates used to produce Superbills.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee has been recruited and given a phone number to contact for the mission.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The location of the counterfeit plates is unknown.
evidence_quotes: Lee examines the stack of HUNDRED DOLLAR BILLS from Hu Li's package.
That's right before he left the force.
Okay, find out where Hu Li's keeping the plates.
From this moment on, you're working for the United States Secret Service.

relation_updates: Formally recruited by Isabella into the Secret Service
status_updates: Now working for the U.S. Secret Service
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector now working under Secret Service directive.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Injured and trapped, Lee and Carter share banter about dumplings and Lee's singing, discuss their fears, and confront mortality with dark humor amid tension and a fragile bond.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Trapped and injured in a truck, Lee shares personal vulnerabilities with Carter, including admitting he's not used to having a partner.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee and Carter discuss their fears and personal lives, such as Lee's past relationship and his singing, leading to a moment of connection despite denials.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee and Carter have acknowledged a bond through personal conversation, even as they verbally deny being partners or friends.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The threat of torture and execution by the Fu-Cang-Long, and their uncertain escape from the truck.
evidence_quotes: I'm not used to having a partner.
Tell me the truth, Carter. Do you think I have a good voice?

relation_updates: Lee admits he's not used to having a partner
Lee and Carter deny being friends but bond over personal revelations
status_updates: Lee is injured and trapped in the truck
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector who, while trapped and injured, admits he's not accustomed to having a partner, showing vulnerability.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Isabella tells Lee the plates are in the soft count room; Carter distracts guards at the craps table so Lee can investigate, despite Carter's distrust of Isabella.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lee decides to help Isabella personally and, with Carter, plans a distraction to access the soft count room.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee commits to aiding Isabella directly, not the Secret Service, and with Carter's agreement, sets a plan in motion to retrieve the plates.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Retrieve the plates from the soft count room with Carter's distraction.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee is prepared to investigate the soft count room, with Carter set to provide a distraction at the craps table.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Carter's distrust of Isabella and the risk of the plan failing.
evidence_quotes: No. (beat) But I'll help you.
It was Isabella. She says the plates are in the soft count room.
I'm going to find out.
I'll go to the craps table, make a big scene. When security comes over, you make your move.

relation_updates: Lee aligns with Isabella personally, not the Secret Service
Lee and Carter agree on a plan despite Carter's distrust of Isabella
status_updates: Lee now has a clear objective and a plan to access the soft count room
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An individual who prioritizes personal trust over official channels.

timeline_nodes.scene_title: 94、INT. EYE IN THE SKY ROOM - CONTINUOUS
timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ricky Tan, watching Steven Reign approach his penthouse on surveillance, mocks his actions while reflecting on loyalty with captive Lee, then departs, telling Lee they won't meet again, as Carter enjoys the casino.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Captive inspector witnessing Ricky Tan alive
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee sees Ricky Tan alive, hears his explanation for survival involving metal and a corrupt customs agent, and is taunted with 'like father, like son.'
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Remains bound and gagged, now aware Ricky Tan is alive and has mocked him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The meaning of Ricky Tan's 'like father, like son' comment.
evidence_quotes: Lee has the tape around his mouth and his hands tied behind his back as he's led into the room by Hu Li.
Ricky Tan - alive and well, turns around and stares at Lee.
Lee is shocked at the sight of Ricky Tan alive.
Like father, like son.

relation_updates: Ricky Tan revealed alive
Ricky Tan implies a father-son parallel with Lee
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector shocked and captive, confronted with Ricky Tan's survival and personal taunt.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Ricky Tan stabs Steven Reign after rejecting the moral of a story, takes the black bag, and ignores Lee's demand to drop the plates as Reign lies dead.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Inspector interrupting Ricky Tan after he kills Steven Reign
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee bursts in to find Ricky Tan has stabbed Steven Reign and confronts him over the plates.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Recover the plates from Ricky Tan
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Ricky Tan holds the black bag with plates, and Lee is confronting him
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Lee's attempt to secure the plates from Ricky Tan
evidence_quotes: Lee BURSTS through the suite door - watches as Reign falls dead to the floor.
LEE Put the plates down.

relation_updates: Ricky Tan confirms he killed Lee's father
Lee and Carter work together to subdue Tan
status_updates: Lee has confronted his father's killer
Ricky Tan is dead
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector confronting a killer to recover evidence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Lee gives Carter his father's badge; Carter gives Lee $50,000. They plan a trip to New York, bonding before dancing through the airport as friends.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Lee gives his father's badge to Carter and accepts money to plan a trip to New York.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Lee hands his father's badge to Carter, says he can let it go, and takes $50,000 from Carter to fund a vacation to New York for a Knicks game.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To go to New York and see the Knicks play at Madison Square Garden.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Lee has given away the badge, received $50,000, and is planning a New York trip with Carter.
evidence_quotes: It's okay. I can finally let it go.
I always wanted to go to Madison Square Garden. See the Knicks play.
Amen to that, brother.

relation_updates: Lee and Carter become closer friends, planning a vacation together and dancing in the airport.
status_updates: Lee no longer possesses his father's badge (gave it to Carter).
Lee now possesses $50,000 from Carter.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Inspector who has given away his father's badge and is planning a vacation with a friend.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Inspector Lee begins by taking the embassy bombing case while deceiving his new partner Carter. Their partnership is strained by cultural clashes and Lee's hidden personal vendetta against Ricky Tan, who killed his father. After being sidelined by U.S. authorities, Lee follows the case to Los Angeles, where he and Carter form a genuine bond while dismantling a counterfeiting ring. Lee ultimately confronts Tan, avenges his father, and embraces a future partnership with Carter.
